warnings: One of 2 split sheets on this source PNG (หน้า79); sibling is _หน้า79_2_ceiling_boq.json. This is the physical RIGHT half of the landscape scan (rotate 90 degrees counter-clockwise to read), the lower-numbered sheet (แผ่นที่ 5/20), paired with แผ่นที่ 6/20 extracted as _2.json.
Only 3 line items for 2.1 งานหลังคา, complete on this single sheet with its own 'รวมข้อ 2.1' subtotal row -- does not continue to the next page.
All unit-price/amount columns are blank in the source for every row -- transcribed as null, not invented.
